# PDF Viewer

> A fast, single-file PDF viewer. Drag & drop a PDF to read it — right in your browser.

The viewer is one self-contained HTML file (no build step) and works offline. Files never leave the visitor's device — no uploads, no accounts, no server-side processing.

## Links

- [Open the viewer](https://pdf-viewer.us/)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/MichalAFerber/pdf-web-viewer): Source (single index.html)
- [File Viewer family hub](https://file-viewer.us/): All viewers in the family
- [Privacy Policy](https://file-viewer.us/privacy.html)
- [Terms of Use](https://file-viewer.us/terms.html)
